title: Pan-Seared Goose Breast with Herbal Wrap
description: A flavorful and tender goose breast dish wrapped in a fragrant herbal wrap, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Herbs (such as thyme, rosemary, and oregano)
Mediterranean Fat (such as olive or avocado)

instructions: Season the goose breast with salt and pepper.
Heat the Mediterranean fat in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the goose breast for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
While the goose is cooking, mix the chopped herbs with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Roll out the flaky pastry on a lightly floured surface to a large rectangle.
Spread the herb butter mixture evenly over the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Once the goose is cooked, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Wrap each slice of goose in a piece of ssam wrap, topped with a spoonful of the herb butter.
